# Decision Trails Dashboard — Weekly Summary Template

> **Template ID:** decision-dashboard-tmpl  
> **Purpose:** Weekly summary report generated from checkpoint.yaml decision trail  
> **Generated By:** `.github/scripts/generate-dashboard.mjs` or orchestrator manually  
> **Output Location:** `docs/dashboards/decision-trails-weekly-YYYYMMDD.md`

---

## Decision Trails Dashboard — Weekly Summary

**Report Period:** {start_date} — {end_date}  
**Generated:** {generation_timestamp}  
**Project:** {project_name}

---

### Weekly Summary: PDLC Progression

| Metric | This Week | Target | Status |
|--------|-----------|--------|--------|
| **Phase Progress** | {phases_completed} | On track | ✅/⚠️/❌ |
| **Gate Pass Rate** | {pass_rate}% ({passed}/{total} gates) | 85%+ | ✅/⚠️/❌ |
| **Avg Rework Cycles** | {avg_rework} cycles/phase | <1.0 | ✅/⚠️/❌ |
| **Decision Consistency** | {compliance}% aligned with workflows | 95%+ | ✅/⚠️/❌ |
| **Blocker Detection** | {blockers_caught} blockers caught early | TBD | ✅/⚠️/❌ |

### Risk Indicators

**Current Blockers** (from gate FAILs):
- [ ] {blocker_description}
  - Blocker since: {date} ({days} days)
  - Expected resolution: {date}
  - Impact: {impact_description}

**Escalations** (gate CONDITIONAL):
- [ ] {escalation_description}
  - Condition: {condition_description}
  - Status: {cleared/pending}

**Pattern Analysis:**
- Most common blocker type: {blocker_type} ({percentage}% of FAILs)
- Success factor: {success_pattern}
- Rework trend: {trend_description}

### Quality Metrics

**Workflow Adherence:**
- Phase {phase}: {compliance}% compliance ({deviations} deviations)

**Decision Trail Completeness:**
- Decisions logged: {logged}/{total} ({percentage}% coverage)
- Decision entries with full context: {complete}/{total} ({percentage}%)

**Gate Quality:**
- {gate_id}: Quality Score {score}/10 ({key_metrics})
